shipping.summary: | Delivery and Returns Enter your search Different International delivery options are available dependent on country; How can I return my order?

tax.summary: Do I have to pay import taxes or customs duty on orders outside the UK?

fee.summary: If delivery is over €150 or to an address outside the EU, you may be charged taxes or duties on import into the destination country - we recommend you contact your local customs authority to understand the potential costs prior to placing an order.

result.overall_note: Local rule-based extraction from official policy pages.

update_payload.tax_guide: Do I have to pay import taxes or customs duty on orders outside the UK?
update_payload.fee_guide: If delivery is over €150 or to an address outside the EU, you may be charged taxes or duties on import into the destination country - we recommend you contact your local customs authority to understand the potential costs prior to placing an order.
